descriptions.aboleth: A massive primordial amphibious predator with a long, muscular fishlike body, a broad blunt head, three pale eyes arranged vertically, and four powerful facial tentacles. Its slick skin is ridged and scarred, with low fins running along the spine and a heavy tapering tail built for deep water.
descriptions.adult-black-dragon: A huge mature swamp dragon with a long gaunt four-legged body, skull-like head, great forward-curving horns, one pair of broad tattered-edged wings, and a sinuous swimming tail. Scarred black scales shine with green oil-like reflections, while corrosive acid smokes in channels along the jaw and breast.
descriptions.adult-blue-dragon: A huge mature desert dragon with a long four-legged body, one massive forward-pointing nasal horn, ridged brows, fanlike ears, one pair of broad wings, and immense shovel claws. Cobalt scales are abraded by years beneath the sand, and lightning branches across the horn and armored throat.
descriptions.adult-brass-dragon: A huge mature desert dragon with a long four-legged body, broad shieldlike head, strong lateral facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of vast wings, and a sand-scoured tail. Deep brass scales have darkened around the joints and polished bright along exposed ridges, while furnace light gathers behind the teeth.
descriptions.adult-bronze-dragon: A huge mature coastal dragon with a powerful four-legged body, ridged beaklike snout, long swept-back horns, finlike cheek blades, one pair of enormous wings, and a deep swimming tail. Dark bronze scales carry extensive sea-green patina, while electric light runs in branching channels across the neck and jaw.
descriptions.adult-copper-dragon: A huge mature hill dragon with a supple four-legged frame, long angular head, swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of broad climbing wings, and a highly expressive tail. Copper scales are richly weathered with broad verdigris patches, and clear acid vapor threads from a knowing half-open mouth.
descriptions.adult-gold-dragon: A huge mature dragon with a long serpentine four-legged body, elegant many-ridged horn crown, paired flowing barbels, one pair of vast sail-like wings, and a broad finned swimming tail. Rich gold scales deepen toward amber along the spine, while intense white-orange fire glows through the long throat.
descriptions.adult-green-dragon: A huge mature forest dragon with a long four-legged frame, narrow hooked snout, a tall leaflike crest sweeping from brow down the neck, one pair of vast wings, and a flexible swimming tail. Deep green scales carry bark and moss patterns across old scars, while dense yellow poison coils behind the teeth.
descriptions.adult-red-dragon: A huge mature volcanic dragon with a massive four-legged body, broad wedge-shaped skull, towering swept-back horns, one pair of dark powerful wings, and a heavy tail armored in jagged ridges. Deep crimson scales are blackened along old battle scars, and molten light burns between the throat plates.
descriptions.adult-silver-dragon: A huge mature mountain dragon with a broad four-legged body, shield-shaped head, long paired horns swept smoothly backward, layered silver cheek blades, one pair of immense pale wings, and a powerful tapering tail. Brushed scales hold cold blue reflections, while frost and a nearly invisible stilling haze mingle around the jaws.
descriptions.adult-white-dragon: A huge mature arctic dragon with a low muscular four-legged body, broad wedge head, jagged crown spines, one pair of powerful pale wings, webbed swimming feet with hooked claws, and a thick ice-breaking tail. Scarred white scales deepen to glacier blue along the back, and rime constantly renews around the jaws.
descriptions.air-elemental: A towering sentient vortex whose broad upper body and long arms are shaped from layered currents of translucent air. Dust, leaves, and fine droplets reveal the spiral motion around a hollow calm core, while the lower body narrows into a twisting funnel that never quite touches the ground.
descriptions.allosaurus: A large bipedal theropod with a deep narrow skull, ridged brows above the eyes, a flexible neck, strong three-fingered forelimbs, and a long balancing tail. Muscular hind legs carry the body horizontally, and pebbled scales are interrupted by sparse filament-like quills along the neck and spine.
descriptions.ancient-black-dragon: A gargantuan ancient swamp dragon with a famine-lean four-legged body, enormously long skull-like head, monumental forward-curving horns, one pair of ragged colossal wings, and a serpentlike swimming tail. Centuries of acid have pitted the black armor into green-edged channels, and corrosive vapor rolls continuously from the jaws.
descriptions.ancient-blue-dragon: A gargantuan ancient desert dragon with a continent-long four-legged frame, one titanic forward-pointing nasal horn, massive ear frills, one pair of colossal angular wings, and foreclaws shaped like excavation blades. Cobalt armor is scoured pale at the ridges and fused to glassy patches by countless lightning discharges.
descriptions.ancient-brass-dragon: A gargantuan ancient desert dragon with an enormously long four-legged body, weathered shieldlike head, vast lateral facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of continent-wide wings, and a tail furrowed by ages of burrowing. Brass scales range from bright worn ridges to nearly black recesses, with heat shimmering across every breath.
descriptions.ancient-bronze-dragon: A gargantuan ancient coastal dragon with an immense four-legged body, monumental beaklike head, sweeping rearward horns, finlike cheek blades, one pair of colossal wings, and a deep ocean-going tail. Ancient bronze scales are almost overtaken by verdigris, barnacle scars, and salt-polished ridges, while lightning maps every contour.
descriptions.ancient-copper-dragon: A gargantuan ancient hill dragon with an extraordinarily long flexible four-legged body, angular head, immense swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of colossal climbing wings, and a tail that curls around entire rock spires. Copper scales form a map of bright worn edges and deep turquoise patina accumulated over centuries.
descriptions.ancient-gold-dragon: A gargantuan ancient dragon with an immense serpentine four-legged body, elaborate natural horn crown, long paired barbels, one pair of colossal sail-like wings, and a broad finned tail. Gold scales range from sun-bright worn edges to deep amber recesses, and a furnace-white glow fills the entire throat and chest.
descriptions.ancient-green-dragon: A gargantuan ancient forest dragon with an impossibly long four-legged body, narrow hooked skull, towering leaflike crest, one pair of colossal wings, and a winding tail suited to submerged movement. Layered green scales resemble bark, moss, and old leaves across centuries of scars, while poison fog pours continuously between the teeth.
descriptions.ancient-red-dragon: A gargantuan ancient volcanic dragon with a mountain-heavy four-legged body, enormous wedge skull, forest of long swept-back horns, one pair of scorched colossal wings, and a ridged tail powerful enough to shatter towers. Ancient crimson scales are blackened, cracked, and molten at the deepest seams.
descriptions.ancient-silver-dragon: A gargantuan ancient mountain dragon with a monumental four-legged body, vast shield-shaped head, paired horns sweeping far behind the skull, layered silver cheek blades, one pair of colossal pale wings, and a long stately tail. Centuries of fine scratches soften the mirrorlike scales, while cold and a silent paralyzing haze radiate from every breath.
descriptions.ancient-white-dragon: A gargantuan ancient arctic dragon with a brutally powerful four-legged frame, massive wedge-shaped head, forest of backward ice-like crown spines, one pair of scarred colossal wings, and a thick tail capable of breaking glaciers. Layered white scales are cracked blue with age, and permanent rime hangs from the jaws and wing joints.
descriptions.animated-armor: An empty suit of full plate armor held upright by invisible force. The helmet visor is black and vacant, every articulated plate is present, and faint arcane light leaks through narrow joints without forming a body inside.
descriptions.animated-flying-sword: A riderless longsword held aloft by invisible magic, with a straight double-edged steel blade, practical crossguard, leather-wrapped grip, and heavy pommel. Cold blue runes pulse faintly along the fuller while dust circles the empty space where a wielder would stand.
descriptions.animated-rug-of-smothering: A large, heavy floor rug animated into a predatory sheet, its woven geometric pattern bending across deep unnatural folds. Thick tasseled edges curl like grasping fingers, while the central fabric arches into a wave ready to wrap a victim; it has no face, limbs, or floating aura.
descriptions.ankheg: A horse-sized burrowing insect with a low segmented body, six powerful legs, and overlapping plates of earth-stained chitin. Broad digging forelimbs flank a wedge-shaped head armed with hooked mandibles, and a swollen throat sac gleams acidic yellow beneath the jaw.
descriptions.ankylosaurus: A huge low-slung herbivorous dinosaur protected by rows of bony plates and rounded knobs across its broad back. Four columnar legs support the heavy body, a beaked head stays close to the ground, and the long rigid tail ends in a massive paired bone club.
descriptions.ape: A powerful natural ape with a deep barrel chest, long muscular arms, shorter bowed legs, and a dark expressive face beneath a heavy brow. Dense charcoal-brown fur covers the body except for the hands, feet, ears, and face, and one broad hand closes around a rough throwing stone.
descriptions.archelon: A colossal prehistoric marine turtle with a broad leathery carapace stretched over a visible bony framework, an enormous hooked beak, and four long paddle-shaped flippers. Its mottled shell is scarred by age and carries small barnacles, while a short tail follows the massive hydrodynamic body.
descriptions.archmage: A small-statured elder spellcaster whose simple layered robes and carefully repaired mantle show decades of use rather than rank through ornament. A compact focus hangs at the sternum, several spell diagrams orbit the hands, and a translucent ward bends the background light around the entire figure.
descriptions.assassin: A small adult infiltration specialist in close-fitted layered armor designed to silence movement, with a hood that leaves peripheral vision clear and no decorative insignia. A narrow shortsword is held in reverse grip, while a compact light crossbow and carefully sealed poison vials sit within immediate reach.
descriptions.awakened-shrub: A waist-high living shrub pulled free of the soil, its tangled root mass divided into several sturdy walking roots and its woody branches flexing like simple arms. Knots and bark folds suggest an alert face without becoming a carved wooden mask.
descriptions.awakened-tree: A huge living hardwood tree whose trunk has twisted into a slow, powerful torso. Two main boughs articulate as massive arms, split roots lift and plant like many blunt feet, and knots in the bark form a stern suggestion of a face beneath a broad natural crown.
descriptions.axe-beak: A towering flightless bird with powerful running legs, a shaggy feathered body, small useless wings, and a massive laterally flattened beak shaped like a chopping axe. Its long bare neck and keen eyes balance a heavy rust-and-black torso.
descriptions.azer-sentinel: A broad elemental smith shaped like a compact humanoid of living bronze, with a disciplined square stance and fire forming both its swept hair and full beard. Geometric scale armor covers the torso and limbs, and both hands grip a heavy forge hammer whose head glows along the striking face.
descriptions.baboon: A lean, ground-foraging baboon with a doglike muzzle, heavy brow, close gray-brown coat, and a rough mantle of longer hair around the shoulders. Its long limbs end in dexterous dark hands and feet, while the tail arcs behind for balance.
descriptions.badger: A tiny but tenacious badger with a squat body, wedge-shaped head, rounded ears, and short digging legs. Bold pale stripes run from its nose over a grizzled dark coat, and soil clings to the long curved claws of its forefeet.
descriptions.balor: A huge abyssal war-demon with a towering horned humanoid body, one pair of vast batlike wings, cloven armored feet, and a long tail trailing through its fire aura. One hand grips a many-tailed flame whip and the other a broad blade made brilliant by captive lightning, while cracks in the dark hide glow like a furnace.
descriptions.bandit: A compact adult humanoid outlaw in layered, travel-worn clothing and light protection chosen for speed. A scarf and low hood partly conceal the face; a curved scimitar is held in one hand and a light crossbow is slung within easy reach.
descriptions.bandit-captain: A small-statured adult outlaw commander in layered leather, a reinforced coat, and a weathered sash hung with maps and signal tokens. A curved scimitar is held in the leading hand, while a single early fantasy pistol rides in a sturdy belt holster as an expensive badge of rank.
descriptions.barbed-devil: A lean infernal hunter covered from crown to heel in backward-pointing barbs, with a narrow horned skull, long clawed arms, powerful climbing feet, and a sinuous spiked tail. Its hide resembles overlapping plates of dark fired clay, and furnace light pulses faintly in the seams around its mouth and chest.
descriptions.basilisk: A squat reptilian monstrosity with a broad crocodilian head, eight short clawed legs, and a thick low body armored by pebbled scales. Irregular bony spurs rise along the back, while two pale green eyes burn with a mineral light that seems to dull the color of nearby stone.
descriptions.bat: A tiny natural bat with a compact furred body, a short muzzle, large alert ears, small dark eyes, and broad finger-boned wings joined by thin membranes. Its hind feet curl beneath the body and the wing membranes show delicate veins in the light.
descriptions.bearded-devil: A lean, disciplined devil with rust-red scaled hide, swept horns, clawed feet, and a jaw surrounded by a living beard of short barbed tendrils. It carries a long black infernal glaive in both hands, and angular plates of natural armor overlap the shoulders and shins.
descriptions.behir: A huge serpentine monstrosity with a long sinuous body, exactly twelve short climbing legs, a narrow crocodilian head, swept horn ridges, and a deep expandable throat. Blue armored scales flash with internal electricity along the spine, while the underside is flexible enough to coil and constrict.
descriptions.berserker: A small-statured adult raider with a dense, athletic build, scarred forearms, and a mane of sweat-dark hair kept clear of the eyes by a leather tie. Patchwork hide and layered wool leave the arms mobile, and both hands carry a broad, nicked greataxe built for repeated heavy swings.
descriptions.black-bear: A natural black bear with a compact muscular body, straight facial profile, tall rounded ears, and glossy short fur broken by a small tan muzzle. Long curved claws show beneath agile forepaws suited to climbing, and the shoulders remain lower than a brown bear's hump.
descriptions.black-dragon-wyrmling: A young black dragon with four lean legs, two leathery wings, a long swimming tail, and a narrow skull whose swept horns curve forward beside the cheeks. Glossy black scales carry an oily green sheen, and pale acid etching marks the teeth and throat plates.
descriptions.black-pudding: A large pool of glossy black living ooze with the depth and weight of poured tar. Its edges split into slow branching lobes that climb walls and rejoin, while corroded mineral grains and faint blue electrical flickers move beneath an otherwise featureless surface.
descriptions.blink-dog: A lean fey hound with a narrow intelligent face, upright ears, long runner's legs, and a smooth golden-tan coat patterned by faint pale whorls. Its outline doubles subtly in cool light as if the animal occupies two nearby positions during a blink.
descriptions.blood-hawk: A fierce small hawk with a deep rust-red breast, dark slate wings, a hooked black beak, and unusually robust talons. Its forward glare and scarlet feather markings give the natural raptor a predatory identity without turning it into a supernatural beast.
descriptions.blue-dragon-wyrmling: A young blue dragon with four lean legs, two powerful wings, a long tail, and a wedge-shaped head dominated by one tall horn rising from the snout. Cobalt scales fade to sand along the belly, broad ear-like frills sweep backward, and static crawls across the teeth and wing joints.
descriptions.boar: A compact wild boar with a bristling dark coat, wedge-shaped head, high shoulders, small fierce eyes, and two curved lower tusks. Mud cakes its cloven hooves and the coarse ridge of mane along its spine lifts as it prepares to charge.
descriptions.bone-devil: A tall skeletal-looking devil with an insectile ribbed torso, narrow horned skull, very long clawed arms, digitigrade legs, one pair of dry leathery wings, and a segmented tail ending in a large venomous stinger. Pale bone-colored armor plates are part of the body rather than worn equipment.
descriptions.brass-dragon-wyrmling: A young brass dragon with four clawed legs, two broad leathery wings, a long tail, and warm metallic scales polished brighter along the chest. A wide shieldlike brow plate, paired swept-back horns, and layered chin plates distinguish its wedge-shaped head, while heat shimmers faintly at the throat.
descriptions.bronze-dragon-wyrmling: A young bronze dragon with four sturdy legs, two broad wings, a finned tail, and a sculpted head crowned by swept-back ribbed horns. Bronze scales darken toward blue-green at the joints, while faint electrical arcs jump between horn tips and along the throat.
descriptions.brown-bear: A massive brown bear with a pronounced shoulder hump, dish-shaped facial profile, small rounded ears, and dense grizzled fur ranging from dark umber to sunlit gold. Long pale foreclaws curve from broad paws beneath the heavy chest.
descriptions.bugbear-stalker: A tall, long-limbed goblinoid hunter with dense ochre-brown fur, broad pointed ears, heavy shoulders, and arms that reach unnervingly far. Quiet layered leather and a ragged camouflage mantle soften its outline, while a brutal morningstar and several long javelins are carried for ambush and abduction.
descriptions.bugbear-warrior: A tall broad-shouldered fey goblinoid covered in coarse brown-black hair, with long pointed ears, a flattened nose, heavy brow, and arms disproportionately long enough to reach past the knees. Patched hide armor leaves those limbs free; one hand carries a squat light hammer while the other opens to seize prey.
descriptions.bulette: A massive four-legged burrowing predator with a broad wedge-shaped head, an enormous tooth-filled mouth, and a domed back protected by interlocking mineral-hard plates. Short powerful limbs end in wide digging claws, while the low-slung body narrows toward a thick balancing tail.
descriptions.camel: A tall one-humped camel with long jointed legs, broad padded feet, a narrow expressive head, and a shaggy sand-colored coat thickest along the neck and hump. Its nostrils are narrow against dust and a simple rope halter lies loose around the muzzle.
descriptions.cat: A small, agile domestic cat with a lean torso, fine-boned legs, alert triangular ears, and luminous eyes. Short tabby fur follows the movement of its shoulders, and its long flexible tail curls upward as it judges a jump.
descriptions.centaur-trooper: A disciplined fey cavalry warrior whose armored humanoid torso joins seamlessly at the waist to the withers of a tall, powerful horse. A long pike is leveled beneath one arm, a longbow and fitted quiver follow the equine flank, and practical segmented armor leaves all four legs free.
descriptions.chain-devil: A tall infernal jailer with scarred gray-red hide, a severe featureless mask of flesh, and long arms wrapped in animated hooked chains. Additional lengths coil around the torso and trail across the floor under their own power, each link blackened by heat and edged for cutting rather than ornament.
descriptions.chimera: A huge winged predator built around a lionlike body, with a snarling lion head, a horned goat head rising beside it, and a red-scaled dragon head projecting from the opposite shoulder. Powerful leonine legs support the fused torso, one pair of leathery wings spans the back, and a long tail ends in a living serpent head.
descriptions.chuul: A towering amphibious crustacean aberration with a heavily plated lobsterlike body, many jointed walking legs, and two enormous asymmetrical pincers. A cluster of flexible sensory tentacles surrounds the mouth beneath small dark eyes, and its blue-green shell is layered with scars and mineral growth.
descriptions.clay-golem: A towering roughly sculpted humanoid of dense fired and unfired clay, with a blunt head, immense shoulders, long heavy arms, and simple carved channels for controlling runes. Its surface is cracked and repaired in layers, and faint acidic light seeps from a few deep fissures without revealing flesh or machinery.
descriptions.cloaker: A broad subterranean aberration shaped like a living black mantle, with vast triangular winglike fins, a pale ribbed underside, a hidden central mouth of hooked teeth, and a long muscular tail ending in a blade-shaped tip. Two small red eyes sit near the front ridge, easily concealed when the creature folds itself shut.
descriptions.cloud-giant: A majestic giant of immense height with cool blue-gray skin, flowing silver-white hair, and a powerful but refined build. Layered storm-colored robes and light ornate armor move in an unseen wind, while an enormous mace channels thunder and a compact dark cloud curls obediently around the free hand.
descriptions.cockatrice: A small grotesque monstrosity combining a roosterlike head and feathered breast with a long reptilian body, two clawed legs, one pair of leathery batlike wings, and a tapering lizard tail. A toothed beak, fleshy comb, and pebbled scales meet in an unsettling but coherent animal form.
descriptions.commoner: A compact adult laborer with weathered features, work-roughened hands, and sturdy everyday clothes repaired many times. A plain wooden club is gripped uncertainly in both hands, while a small utility pouch and simple cord belt suggest an ordinary working life.
descriptions.constrictor-snake: A large heavy-bodied constrictor with a broad blunt head, heat-dark eyes, muscular coils, and intricate brown saddle markings across olive scales. The thick torso narrows gradually into a powerful tail, with no venom fangs or ornamental hood.
descriptions.copper-dragon-wyrmling: A young copper dragon with four nimble clawed legs, two leathery wings, a long balancing tail, and burnished penny-colored scales. Heavy brow ridges sweep into paired backward horns, while layered cheek frills and a narrow mischievous muzzle give the head a distinct angular profile.
descriptions.couatl: A graceful celestial serpent covered in fine jewel-toned feathers rather than scales, with a refined draconic head, calm luminous eyes, and a pair of broad feathered wings. Long iridescent plumes flow from its crown and tail, giving the creature a sacred, ceremonial presence.
descriptions.crab: A tiny shore crab with a broad flattened carapace, stalked black eyes, five pairs of jointed limbs, and two modest pincers. Saltwater beads on its mottled shell, whose chipped edges and sandy underside blend naturally with tidal rock.
descriptions.crocodile: A large river crocodile with a long armored body, broad wedge-shaped snout, ridged back, short powerful legs, and a deep muscular tail. Olive scales darken between raised scutes, while conical teeth remain visible even when the heavy jaws nearly close.
descriptions.cultist: A compact adult zealot in plain layered robes adapted for concealment and travel, with an angular hood shadowing an intent face. One hand holds a crescent-bladed ritual sickle darkened by repeated ceremonies, while the other gathers a cord of small bone and iron tokens.
descriptions.cultist-fanatic: A small-statured adult zealot in austere layered robes reinforced by a hidden leather harness. A dark pact blade with an asymmetrical edge is held close to the body, and thin strands of necrotic light crawl from ritual marks on the glove toward the weapon.
descriptions.darkmantle: A cave predator resembling a charcoal-black flying mantle, with a rough conical back that can mimic a stalactite and exactly eight short muscular tentacles webbed around its pale underside. Eight tiny vestigial eyespots and a circular gripping maw hide beneath the folded body, while the scalloped membrane permits silent flight.
descriptions.death-dog: A lean desert monstrosity with one canine body supporting exactly two snarling hound heads on separate muscular necks. Its mangy rust-black coat reveals no wounds, but sickly saliva threads from both dark muzzles and the four long legs move with unnerving coordination.
descriptions.deer: A healthy adult deer with a fine narrow head, large mobile ears, long graceful legs, and a warm russet-brown coat paling along the throat and belly. A modest branching rack crowns the head, built for a swift woodland animal rather than a fantastical beast.
descriptions.deva: A tall celestial guardian with a strong humanoid body, serene ageless face, luminous eyes, and one pair of broad feathered wings. Simple fitted armor and flowing pale cloth leave the arms free to wield a heavy radiant mace, while warm light repairs small fractures in both armor and feathers.
descriptions.dire-wolf: A pony-sized wolf with a deep chest, long muscular legs, broad skull, and dense silver-gray coat raised along the spine. Heavy paws spread over the ground and a powerful muzzle holds large but natural canines, while pale amber eyes remain fixed with pack-hunter intelligence.
descriptions.djinni: A towering air elemental noble in humanoid form, with wind-swept features, cloud-white hair, two strong arms, and layered garments that unravel into a controlled cyclone below the knees. A curved blade is made from compressed storm wind, while small lightning filaments and floating cloth edges reveal constant hovering motion.
descriptions.doppelganger: A hairless, ash-gray humanoid in its true form, with smooth skin, elongated fingers, large dark eyes, and features that are almost human but stripped of age, ancestry, and expression. One side of the body ripples through several borrowed faces and clothing textures as its unsettling disguise collapses.
descriptions.draft-horse: A massive working horse with a broad chest, thick neck, powerful hindquarters, and feathered hair around large dark hooves. A patient dark bay head sits beneath a heavy mane, while a plain padded collar and traces show a life of hauling.
descriptions.dragon-turtle: A gargantuan marine dragon with a vast domed turtle shell, broad horned reptilian head, four powerful paddlelike legs ending in claws, and a thick rudder tail. Dark green-blue scales overlap the neck and limbs, barnacles crust the ridged shell, and superheated steam condenses around the jaws.
descriptions.dretch: A squat, potbellied demon with rubbery gray-green hide, long apelike arms, bowed legs, and a loose jowled face beneath small flattened ears. Hooked claws tip its hands and feet, while damp folds and a faint yellow haze suggest the fetid cloud held inside it.
descriptions.drider: A large underworld hunter whose armored humanoid torso rises seamlessly from the front of a vast spider abdomen. Two sinewy arms and a severe, pale-eyed face sit above eight long jointed legs, while glossy plates, sparse sensory hairs, and venom-bright seams reinforce the predatory fusion.
descriptions.druid: A small-statured adult nature keeper in layered bark-brown cloth, soft leather, and a mantle of living leaves. A crooked staff wrapped in a flowering vine serves as both focus and weapon, while a compact green-gold wisp hovers over the free palm.
descriptions.dryad: An adult fey whose graceful humanoid form appears grown from living woodland matter: warm bark plates follow the limbs, moss softens the joints, and a crown of leafy twigs blends into long vine-like hair. Clear green eyes and a recognizably expressive face emerge naturally from wood grain rather than a carved mask.
descriptions.dust-mephit: A small angular elemental with a wiry humanoid torso, one pair of ragged membranous wings, clawed limbs, and a pointed face eroded as if carved from compacted dust. Fine sand leaks from its joints and gathers into a blinding spiral around its open jaws.
descriptions.eagle: A powerful natural eagle with a dark brown body, broad layered flight feathers, a pale crown and tail, and a heavy hooked beak. Its yellow talons are spread beneath the body, every toe and primary feather readable against the sky.
descriptions.earth-elemental: A broad, towering figure assembled from compacted stone, broken strata, and dense soil, with shoulders like cliff ledges and immense hammer-shaped hands. No separate clothing or armor interrupts the geology; a dim mineral glow marks deep-set eyes as loose gravel continually falls and rejoins the body.
descriptions.efreeti: A towering fire elemental noble in a powerful humanoid form, with coal-dark skin, ember-bright eyes, two arms, and hair rising as controlled flame. Layered heat-resistant robes and dark metal plates frame the body, while a long curved blade glows red-hot and the lower garments trail into smoke and sparks during flight.
descriptions.elephant: A huge adult elephant with broad fanlike ears, thick wrinkled gray skin, a long muscular trunk, and two gently curved ivory tusks. Columnar legs support the high shoulders and barrel body, while dust gathers in the folds and a sparse tail tuft flicks behind.
descriptions.elk: A towering elk with long dark legs, a deep russet-brown body, heavy neck mane, and an expansive symmetrical rack of branching antlers. Its pale rump patch and dark face remain naturalistic, built around the weight and speed of a large wild ungulate.
descriptions.erinyes: A severe infernal warrior with an athletic humanoid body, one pair of broad black-feathered wings, fitted dark armor, and an unflinching expression. A withering longsword burns with muted necrotic light, while a living crimson rope coils from the free hand in precise loops ready to entangle.
descriptions.ettercap: A gaunt spiderlike humanoid with a swollen abdomen, two long arms ending in claws, two powerful legs, and smaller sensory limbs clustered near a fanged face. Sparse dark bristles cover gray-violet hide, and thick webbing clings to hooked joints without disguising the bipedal frame.
descriptions.ettin: A huge two-headed giant with a thick asymmetrical torso, two powerful arms, and mismatched heads rising from separate necks above the same shoulders. One rough face is shaggy and suspicious while the other is bald and snarling; a battleaxe and iron morningstar are carried independently in either hand.
descriptions.fire-elemental: A towering living conflagration whose torso, head, and long arms are suggested by layered sheets of flame rather than solid anatomy. A white-hot core shows through the chest, while the lower body narrows into a turbulent column of fire and airborne embers.
descriptions.fire-giant: A towering, massively built giant with charcoal-dark skin, ember-red hair, and a squared, disciplined bearing. Heavy blackened plate armor protects the torso and limbs; one hand grips an immense flame-edged sword while a brutal throwing hammer hangs ready at the belt.
descriptions.flesh-golem: A tall, heavy humanoid construct assembled from carefully joined sections of preserved flesh, with an uneven skull, broad hands, and thick limbs reinforced by dark metal staples and leather braces. The expression is blank rather than suffering, and faint blue-white electricity traces across conductive rods at the shoulders.
descriptions.flying-snake: A tiny brilliantly patterned serpent with a narrow head, smooth overlapping scales, and a pair of broad feathered wings growing just behind the neck. Its long body remains fully serpentine, tapering to a fine tail as iridescent flight feathers shift from emerald to copper.
descriptions.frog: A tiny green-brown frog with a compact head, smooth damp skin, prominent coppery eyes, and long folded hind legs made for sudden leaps. Webbing spreads between its rear toes, while the front feet rest lightly on a wet leaf.
descriptions.frost-giant: A colossal cold-weather warrior with pale blue skin, ice-white braided hair, and a broad disciplined build. Thick furs and layered hide sit beneath practical metal armor, while an enormous frost-rimed axe fills both hands and a giant bow with spear-sized arrows rides across the back.
descriptions.gargoyle: A lean winged elemental carved in the likeness of a horned humanoid predator, its body made from weathered dark stone rather than flesh. Broad batlike wings, hooked claws, and a short heavy tail grow seamlessly from the masonry form, with rain channels and lichen disguising it as architecture at rest.
descriptions.gelatinous-cube: A nearly transparent cube of dense living gel large enough to fill a dungeon corridor. Its edges sag slightly under their own weight, faint ripples travel through the clear body, and a few corroded scraps and pale mineral fragments hang suspended inside.
descriptions.ghast: A tall, corpse-thin undead scavenger with gray-green skin drawn tightly across bones, a distended jaw of broken teeth, and long black claws. Shreds of burial cloth cling to the torso, greasy hair hangs in cords, and a faint greasy haze suggests its overwhelming stench without graphic decay.
descriptions.ghost: A translucent humanoid apparition whose gaunt face and hands retain the memory of a former person. Tattered period-neutral garments dissolve into vapor at the edges, and the lower body fades completely into a drifting incorporeal trail rather than legs.
descriptions.ghoul: A gaunt undead humanoid with taut ash-gray skin, sunken milky eyes, long blackened nails, and a wide jaw lined with broken predatory teeth. Torn burial cloth hangs from a body held in a low animal crouch, conveying hunger without exposed organs or graphic decay.
descriptions.giant-ape: An immense natural ape with a massive barrel chest, long muscular arms, a low domed head, dark expressive eyes, and thick black-brown hair over weathered skin. Broad grasping hands, powerful climbing feet, and small scars from forest life emphasize believable primate anatomy at extraordinary scale.
descriptions.giant-badger: A boar-sized badger with a broad low torso, massive digging shoulders, bold black-and-cream facial stripes, and long soil-darkened foreclaws. Coarse grizzled fur forms a protective mantle above short, immensely sturdy legs.
descriptions.giant-bat: A horse-sized cave bat with a compact furred body, huge leaf-thin ears, a short wrinkled muzzle, and broad wings supported by elongated finger bones. Its dark membranes show branching veins and old tears, while hooked hind feet trail beneath the body.
descriptions.giant-boar: A massive wild boar with a barrel-shaped body, high armored shoulders, coarse bristling hair, and a wedge-shaped head carried low. Two long curved tusks rise outside the mouth, smaller whetters sit beneath them, and mud cakes the thick legs and split hooves.
descriptions.giant-centipede: A man-long centipede with a flattened segmented body, one pair of sharp-jointed legs on every trunk segment, long searching antennae, and hooked venom claws beneath the head. Its rust-black chitin flexes in a precise wave over stone.
descriptions.giant-constrictor-snake: A truly immense constricting snake with a trunk-thick body, broad muscular head, heat-sensing pits along the upper lip, and overlapping scales polished by water and vegetation. Dark saddle markings break up its olive length, while the lower body coils with enough mass to pin a large animal.
descriptions.giant-crab: A broad man-sized crab protected by a thick ridged carapace, with stalked eyes, eight jointed walking legs, and two massive asymmetrical pincers capable of locking around prey. Barnacle scars and green algae mark the reddish shell without obscuring its clean crustacean anatomy.
descriptions.giant-crocodile: An immense mature crocodilian with a broad armored skull, thick jaw muscles, a low ridged body, and a tail powerful enough to churn an entire channel. Heavy osteoderms rise along its back, old scars cross the snout, and mud hangs from the short splayed legs and hooked claws.
descriptions.giant-eagle: A horse-sized celestial eagle with a deep dark-brown body, pale gold crown and tail, immense layered wings, and a powerful hooked beak. Sunlike radiance traces the edges of its primary feathers and talons, adding celestial presence while preserving natural raptor anatomy.
descriptions.giant-elk: A towering celestial elk larger than a draft horse, with long clean limbs, a deep chest, and a many-tined rack spanning wider than its body. Its russet coat pales toward silver at the neck and legs, and fine points of warm radiance trace the antlers without making the animal translucent.
descriptions.giant-fire-beetle: A dog-sized beetle with a low armored body, six sturdy legs, and overlapping dark carapace plates. Exactly two luminous orange glands sit above its eyes, casting a steady warm light across the mandibles and cave floor.
descriptions.giant-frog: A wolf-sized frog with a broad flat head, slick mottled green skin, bulging gold eyes, and enormous folded hind legs. Wide webbed feet spread against the mud, and the pale throat and elastic jaws hint at its ability to seize and swallow prey.
descriptions.giant-goat: A horse-sized mountain goat with a deep muscular chest, thick pale coat, short beard, and two enormous ridged horns sweeping backward in smooth arcs. Broad split hooves grip stone and powerful shoulders align behind the lowered head for a devastating charge.
descriptions.giant-hyena: A horse-sized spotted hyena with towering forequarters, a sloping back, massive neck, rounded ears, and a broad bone-crushing muzzle. Coarse tawny fur rises into a dark mane along the shoulders, and thick paws support the rangy but immensely powerful scavenger.
descriptions.giant-lizard: A massive low-slung lizard with a broad blunt head, muscular shoulders, pebbled olive hide, and a thick tail longer than its torso. Four splayed climbing feet end in strongly curved claws, allowing the heavy reptile to cling to improbable stone surfaces.
descriptions.giant-octopus: A huge natural octopus with a broad muscular mantle, horizontal gold eyes, and exactly eight long arms lined by paired cream suckers. Its skin shifts through deep red, violet, and rock-gray patches, while each independent arm grips reef stone or curls through open water.
descriptions.giant-owl: A great celestial owl with a broad feathered body, immense silent wings, and a perfectly round facial disk surrounding clear silver eyes. Cream and tawny plumage carries a faint pearlescent sheen, while powerful feathered legs end in dark curved talons.
descriptions.giant-rat: A terrier-sized rat with a powerful low body, coarse greasy brown fur, rounded scarred ears, and a long thick tail bare except for fine scales. Yellow incisors show beneath a twitching whiskered muzzle, while nimble claws grip broken masonry.
descriptions.giant-scorpion: A horse-sized desert scorpion encased in overlapping amber-brown chitin, with eight jointed walking legs, two enormous grasping pincers, and a segmented tail arched high over the back. The final bulb carries one dark curved stinger wet with venom.
descriptions.giant-seahorse: A horse-sized seahorse with an upright armored torso, long tubular snout, bony crown, small rippling fins, and a muscular prehensile tail curled beneath it. Blue-green plates overlap like natural armor while a ridged chest and strong neck make its forward ram believable.
descriptions.giant-shark: A colossal open-ocean shark with a torpedo-shaped body, blunt conical snout, high triangular dorsal fin, broad pectoral fins, and a crescent tail built for relentless speed. Rows of pale serrated teeth line the wide mouth, while old scars and small hitchhiking fish emphasize its immense scale.
descriptions.giant-spider: A horse-sized web-spinning spider with a high mottled abdomen, compact cephalothorax, eight long jointed legs, clustered black eyes, and thick downward fangs. Coarse sensory hairs cover its dark body, and pale silk feeds visibly from spinnerets beneath the rear abdomen.
descriptions.giant-toad: A bear-sized toad with a broad heavy head, warty olive skin, golden horizontal-pupiled eyes, and enormous folded hind legs. Poison glands swell behind the eyes, wide webbed feet sink into mud, and the cavernous mouth stretches across nearly the entire face.
descriptions.giant-venomous-snake: A man-long viper with a thick muscular body, sharply triangular head, vertical pupils, and keeled emerald scales broken by dark diamond markings. Two long folding fangs frame the dark mouth, and the neck gathers into a powerful S curve before a strike.
descriptions.giant-vulture: An enormous, ill-tempered vulture with a deep rib cage, long pinioned wings, and a bald, wrinkled head on a corded neck. Ragged black-brown feathers overlap like worn shingles, while the hooked beak and heavy talons are stained by a life of scavenging.
descriptions.giant-wasp: A man-sized wasp with a narrow jointed waist, hard yellow-and-black abdomen, six hooked legs, two long antennae, and two pairs of transparent wings. Heavy mandibles frame the head while a single needlelike stinger extends from the tapered abdomen.
descriptions.giant-weasel: A wolf-long weasel with an extraordinarily flexible torso, low muscular shoulders, short legs, and a small wedge-shaped head. Dense chestnut fur pales along the throat, and its dark eyes and long whiskers remain sharply focused as it slips through cover.
descriptions.giant-wolf-spider: A man-sized wolf spider with a low robust body, eight powerful running legs, two prominent forward eyes above a cluster of smaller ones, and thick downward-pointing chelicerae. Dense brown sensory hairs stripe its abdomen and legs, but no webbing clings to the active hunter.
descriptions.gibbering-mouther: An amorphous mound of pallid flesh that continually folds into itself, studded with blinking eyes and mouths of many sizes. Its lower edge liquefies the stone into a rippling slurry, while several jaws chatter independently and a swollen cavity gathers luminous spittle.
descriptions.glabrezu: A massive four-armed demon with a broad bestial head, heavy horn ridges, digitigrade legs, and a thick armored torso. Its upper pair of arms end in enormous crablike pincers built to seize prey, while the smaller lower pair retain knuckled clawed hands for brutal close strikes.
descriptions.gladiator: A compact professional arena fighter wearing a fitted breastplate, reinforced skirt, greaves, and a crested but practical helmet. A long spear and broad shield show heavy use, while scars, balanced footing, and tightly wrapped hands suggest disciplined training rather than theatrical showmanship.
descriptions.gnoll-warrior: A tall lean fiend with a hyena-like head, rounded ears, spotted tawny hide, digitigrade legs, and long clawed arms. Scraps of dark hide armor leave its rangy frame free to move, while a recurved bow built from pale bone rests ready beside a quiver of black-fletched arrows.
descriptions.goat: A sure-footed domestic goat with a compact frame, coarse cream-and-brown coat, rectangular pupils, a short beard, and two backward-curving horns. Its split hooves grip uneven stone and the shoulders lower naturally before a charge.
descriptions.goblin-boss: A small but commanding goblinoid with sharp fey features, large swept ears, watchful yellow eyes, and a compact, quick-footed build. Well-maintained mail and layered leather mark higher status than the surrounding rabble, and a curved scimitar, shortbow, and crowded quiver remain immediately usable.
descriptions.goblin-minion: A small, wiry fey goblinoid with angular green features, oversized pointed ears, keen yellow-brown eyes, and quick narrow limbs. It wears patched cloth and a few scavenged leather pieces, gripping a plain dagger that looks large beside its slight frame.
descriptions.goblin-warrior: A small, wiry fey goblinoid warrior with angular features, large pointed ears, keen eyes, and quick, balanced limbs. It wears practical mismatched armor over travel-stained clothing and carries a curved scimitar with a shortbow and compact quiver close to the body.
descriptions.gold-dragon-wyrmling: A young gold dragon with four graceful legs, two broad wings, a long finned tail, and an elegant head framed by smooth swept horns and fine whisker-like barbels. Layered gold scales brighten toward the face and chest, while a small heat shimmer gathers behind the teeth.
descriptions.gorgon: A hulking bull-shaped construct clad in overlapping iron plates, with a low armored head, two heavy horns, pistonlike legs, and a thick metal tail. Riveted seams vent pale mineral vapor from within, and the muzzle is built like a furnace grate designed to expel petrifying breath.
descriptions.gray-ooze: A low spreading mass of wet gray protoplasm whose edges flatten into hair-thin exploratory sheets across stone. Its semi-translucent body contains cloudy mineral flecks and slow internal currents, while one blunt pseudopod rises without forming a face or permanent anatomy.
descriptions.green-dragon-wyrmling: A young green dragon with four slender legs, two leathery wings, a long swimming tail, and a narrow cunning head crowned by a rippling leaflike crest. Deep green scales fade to moss at the joints, and yellow-green vapor leaks between the teeth as the throat expands for poison breath.
descriptions.green-hag: A lean old fey with moss-green skin, iron-gray hair, long hooked nails, and sharp features arranged into an expression of patient malice. Ragged wool, bark strips, and marsh reeds form layered clothing, while subtle webbing at the fingers and feet hints at an amphibious nature.
descriptions.grick: A human-sized pallid worm-creature with a thick limbless body, muscular crawling underside, and four fleshy tentacles opening around a hard hooked beak. Its damp hide is mottled like cave stone, with shallow folds rather than scales and no visible eyes.
descriptions.griffon: A formidable hybrid with the head, feathered chest, wings, and taloned forelegs of a giant eagle joined to the tawny hindquarters of a lion. A dense feather mantle conceals the transition, while a long tufted tail and powerful feline back legs complete the predatory build.
descriptions.grimlock: A muscular subterranean humanoid with chalk-gray hide, a heavy brow of unbroken skin where eyes would be, broad nostrils, and large ridged ears tuned to cavern echoes. Ragged hides wrap its torso, and both rough hands grip a brutal cudgel assembled from dense bone.
descriptions.guard: A compact adult watch guard in a practical quilted coat reinforced with mail at the shoulders, a simple open helmet, and a sturdy round shield. A plain spear is held with trained economy; every item is maintained but marked by daily service rather than ceremony.
descriptions.guard-captain: A small-statured adult watch officer in polished but field-ready plate over mail, distinguished by a plain command sash and a fictional city badge. A longsword is held in the leading hand, while two balanced javelins remain clipped behind the shield-side shoulder for rapid use.
descriptions.guardian-naga: A great celestial serpent with a heavy golden-scaled body, an intelligent near-humanoid face, a crown of pale finlike spines, and calm luminous eyes. The long neck rises from protective coils, while pearl-colored fangs carry venom and a controlled spray of shining poison gathers at the lips.
descriptions.half-dragon: A disciplined humanoid warrior transformed by draconic blood, with close-fitting scales across the face and limbs, a strong jaw, small swept horns, clawed hands, and a long balancing tail. Layered scale armor follows the natural plating without hiding it, while a neutral pearlescent glow gathers behind the teeth without fixing the figure to one ancestry.
descriptions.harpy: A lean avian monstrosity with a humanoid head, torso, and two long arms rising above the feathered lower body and powerful birdlike legs of a vulture. A separate pair of broad wings roots behind the shoulders; wind-tangled dark hair, hooked talons, and storm-gray plumage make the creature dangerous without relying on exposed anatomy.
descriptions.hawk: A tiny, swift hawk with a streamlined chest, short rounded head, hooked bill, and narrow barred wings built for rapid turns. Its keen dark eyes face forward as yellow feet tuck beneath a rust-and-cream feathered body.
descriptions.hell-hound: A powerful fiendish hound with the anatomy of a large mastiff, charcoal-black hide, heavy jaws, and plates of ember-cracked skin along the shoulders and spine. Fire glows through the throat and between the teeth, while smoke streams from the nostrils and heat curls the air around its paws.
descriptions.hezrou: A hulking demonic brute with a broad toadlike head, squat neck, immense hunched shoulders, long clawed arms, and thick splayed legs. Warty black-green hide folds around the joints, the wide mouth is lined with crushing teeth, and a visible haze of foul vapor clings close to the body.
descriptions.hill-giant: A towering, thick-bodied giant with a sloping brow, heavy jaw, weathered skin, and tangled hair hanging around immense shoulders. Crude hide layers and scavenged cloth are tied with rope, while a whole uprooted tree serves as a club and a filthy sack of broken debris hangs at the hip.
descriptions.hippogriff: A proud hybrid with the feathered head, hooked beak, wings, and forelegs of a giant eagle joined smoothly to the powerful hindquarters of a horse. The transition is hidden beneath a dense shoulder mantle, while the equine tail streams behind the tawny body.
descriptions.hippopotamus: A massive natural hippopotamus with a barrel-shaped hairless body, short pillar legs, small high-set ears and eyes, and a broad square muzzle. Its mouth opens extraordinarily wide to reveal thick ivory canines and blunt incisors, while wet gray-brown skin shines above the waterline.
descriptions.hobgoblin-captain: A disciplined, medium-sized goblinoid officer with rust-red skin, swept pointed ears, squared features, and a tall martial posture. Carefully fitted mail and reinforced lamellar armor bear restrained geometric insignia; a two-handed greatsword is ready in front, with a longbow and ordered quiver across the back.
descriptions.hobgoblin-warrior: A tall disciplined fey goblinoid with rust-red skin, long pointed ears, a square jaw, and dark hair tied tightly behind the head. Layered iron lamellar over mail gives the warrior a severe geometric profile; a longsword is ready in one hand while a longbow and poison-dark arrows ride across the back.
descriptions.homunculus: A palm-sized artificial creature shaped from fired clay and ash, with a narrow humanoid torso, oversized batlike wings, long delicate fingers, and a small angular head. Fine maker marks cross its surface, and dim violet light shows through hairline seams around the eyes and chest.
descriptions.horned-devil: A large disciplined devil with a muscular red-brown body, a crown of two long horns, one pair of broad leathery wings, clawed digitigrade feet, and a heavy tail ending in a hooked infernal blade. It carries a long two-pronged searing fork, and heat glows beneath the chest scales without consuming the weapon or body.
descriptions.hunter-shark: A large oceanic hunting shark with a streamlined spindle body, pointed snout, tall triangular dorsal fin, crescent tail, and rows of replaceable teeth behind the lips. Countershading shifts from blue-gray above to pale beneath, and old bite scars cross one flank.
descriptions.hydra: A huge amphibious reptilian predator with a low powerful body, four thick legs, a long balancing tail, and exactly five serpentine necks rising from a massively reinforced shoulder girdle. Each head has a narrow crocodilian jaw and its own alert posture, while overlapping marsh-green scales protect the shared body.
descriptions.hyena: A rangy spotted hyena with a sloping back, massive neck and forequarters, rounded ears, and a blunt dark muzzle. Coarse sandy fur stands in a short mane along the spine, while powerful jaws and worn paws suggest an efficient pack hunter.
descriptions.ice-devil: A tall insectile devil with a ridged mantislike head, heavy mandibles, segmented white-blue armor plates, two long clawed arms, digitigrade legs, and a thick jointed tail. It carries a long spear grown over with supernatural ice, while rime gathers across the body despite the infernal surroundings.
descriptions.ice-mephit: A small angular elemental with a wiry humanoid body sculpted from blue-white ice, one pair of thin crystalline wings, clawed limbs, and a sharp mischievous face. Frost feathers every joint and cold mist escapes between translucent ribs as it gathers a cone of freezing breath.
descriptions.imp: A tiny lean devil with leathery wings, narrow shoulders, long clawed fingers, short curved horns, and a flexible tail ending in a sharp venomous barb. Its angular face carries an alert, calculating expression rather than brute ferocity.
descriptions.incubus: An elegant adult fiend with a masculine humanoid frame, subtle swept horns, dark featherless wings, and a narrow tail, dressed in layered midnight cloth that leaves no unnecessary skin exposed. The handsome face is calm but sleepless eyes hold a predatory gleam, and violet psychic distortion gathers around an outstretched hand.
descriptions.invisible-stalker: An unseen large air elemental revealed only by a humanoid-shaped pressure hollow, curling dust, bent rain, and thin contours of refracted light. No solid body occupies the outline; currents wrap around an empty core and tighten into two powerful arm-shaped vortices.
descriptions.iron-golem: A towering humanoid war construct made from interlocking iron plates, with a narrow furnace-slit helm, immense shoulders, and thick jointed legs. One forearm terminates in a heavy integrated blade while the other remains a crushing hand; a chest vent glows with contained fire and the mouth grille holds dense poisonous vapor.
descriptions.jackal: A small, fine-boned jackal with tall pointed ears, a narrow foxlike muzzle, amber eyes, and a black saddle over tawny fur. Its long legs and light paws give it a quick, wary stance, with a modest brush tail held low.
descriptions.killer-whale: A huge adult orca with a muscular streamlined body, tall dorsal fin, broad pectoral flippers, and powerful horizontal tail flukes. Glossy black skin is broken by a white belly, white eye patches, and a gray saddle mark, with a few pale scars along the flank.
descriptions.knight: A small-statured adult professional warrior enclosed in well-fitted plate and mail with restrained, fictional heraldry. A long two-handed greatsword is held across the armored body, while a heavy crossbow rides securely on the back beneath a short weatherproof cloak.
descriptions.kobold-warrior: A small draconic humanoid with russet scales, a narrow wedge-shaped snout, swept-back horn nubs, and a long counterbalancing tail. A patched leather jerkin and small metal plates protect its torso, while one clawed hand carries a practical dagger.
descriptions.kraken: A gargantuan deep-sea monstrosity with a vast mantle, two glaring lateral eyes, a hard central beak, eight heavy muscular arms, and two much longer grasping tentacles. Dark ridged skin carries scars, barnacles, and bioluminescent lines, while electricity flashes across the wet surface and poisonous fluid gathers near the beak.
descriptions.lamia: A large fiend with the tawny four-legged body of a lion joined seamlessly at the shoulders to an imposing humanoid torso. Long dark hair frames a refined but cruel face, both humanoid hands end in heavy claws, and fine jewelry and desert cloth accent the form without hiding its predatory anatomy.
descriptions.lemure: A wretched devil formed as a sagging mound of pale, overheated flesh with a vaguely humanoid head and two short dragging arms. Its features appear half-melted and witless, with a slack mouth, tiny ember-dark eyes, and tarry slime gathering beneath its shapeless lower body.
descriptions.lich: An ancient undead arcanist whose desiccated frame and exposed bone are held upright inside severe, many-layered robes. Cold points of light burn in deep eye sockets, arcane force diagrams orbit one skeletal hand, and the other carries paralyzing frost; a small sealed spirit jar hangs protected within a cage of runes at the chest.
descriptions.lion: A large adult male lion with a dense, weather-roughened mane, tawny muscular body, pale muzzle, and a black tuft at the end of its tail. The shoulders and forelimbs are powerfully developed for grappling, while old scars cross the nose without making the animal unnatural.
descriptions.lizard: A tiny rock lizard with a flattened alert head, beadlike eyes, pebbled scales, splayed climbing toes, and a long tapering tail. Subtle mottling breaks up its outline against stone, and the belly rests close to the surface.
descriptions.mage: A small-statured adult spellcaster in layered travel robes reinforced at the shoulders and forearms, with a slim component satchel and a short practical staff carried at the back. Fine arcane diagrams orbit both hands as condensed bolts of force, illuminating a focused, experienced face.
descriptions.magma-mephit: A small hunched elemental with a cracked basalt hide, glowing molten seams, clawed limbs, and one pair of ragged wings whose membranes resemble cooling lava. Its narrow head opens around a furnace-bright mouth, and viscous sparks drip briefly before hardening into black crust.
descriptions.magmin: A small compact elemental shaped like a stocky humanoid child of living magma, with no clothing, broad hands, short legs, and a rounded head split by furnace-bright eyes and mouth. A thin black crust forms and breaks across the orange molten body as heat ripples around it.
descriptions.mammoth: A gigantic woolly elephant with a high shoulder hump, domed head, small furred ears, long flexible trunk, and two immense tusks sweeping outward and upward. Dense shaggy hair hangs over the powerful legs, with frost clinging to the outer coat and snow packed around broad round feet.
descriptions.manticore: A large monstrosity with the muscular body and four paws of a lion, a broad unsettling humanlike face framed by a coarse mane, and one pair of leathery dragonlike wings. Its long flexible tail ends in a dense fan of removable black spikes aimed like natural darts.
descriptions.marilith: A towering demon with a powerful humanoid upper body, exactly six arms arranged in three balanced pairs, a stern horned face, and a long armored serpent tail instead of legs. Each clawed hand wields a distinct dark pact blade, while the muscular lower coil is thick enough to crush and restrain.
descriptions.mastiff: A broad-chested working mastiff with a square wrinkled muzzle, small folded ears, heavy jowls, and a short brindled coat. Its thick neck and powerful legs support a grounded stance, while a plain leather collar identifies a trained guardian rather than a wild beast.
descriptions.medusa: A solitary monstrous humanoid with a stern weathered face framed by dozens of living venomous snakes instead of hair. Scaled patches cover the shoulders and clawed forearms, layered desert garments protect the torso, and pale green light gathers in the eyes and open palm as a focused poison ray.
descriptions.merfolk-skirmisher: A lithe aquatic warrior with a humanoid upper body, webbed hands, fin-edged forearms, and a powerful fish tail replacing both legs. Sea-green scales deepen along the tail, gill slits mark the neck, and a barbed ocean spear carries a cold blue sheen.
descriptions.merrow: A hulking aquatic monstrosity built like a long-limbed ogre, with slick blue-green hide, a blunt fishlike head, webbed clawed hands, finned legs, and a muscular tail for steering. A barbed harpoon and rope coil are carried across its broad torso, and ragged fins fringe its jaw and spine.
descriptions.mimic: A dungeon chest caught midway through revealing its true amorphous form: warped planks and iron bands split around a broad fleshy seam, while one heavy pseudopod anchors it to the floor. The transformation is wet and muscular, but no decorative eyes or tidy humanlike teeth impose a face on it.
descriptions.minotaur-of-baphomet: A towering bull-headed monstrosity with a massively muscled humanoid torso, coarse black fur, cloven hooves, and huge outward-curving horns carved with abyssal maze marks. Both hands wield a long dark glaive whose blade leaks necrotic violet haze, while scarred leather and iron protect only vital areas.
descriptions.minotaur-skeleton: The reanimated skeleton of a towering bull-headed humanoid, with a long bovine skull, broad horn cores, massive rib cage, and digitigrade leg bones ending in split hooves. Dark binding force occupies the joints where tendons should be, and old iron fragments hang from the pelvis and shoulders.
descriptions.mule: A sturdy mule with long donkey ears, a short upright mane, strong compact legs, and a deep barrel chest. Its dun coat darkens along the spine and lower limbs, while a simple pack saddle carries balanced canvas bundles without hiding the animal.
descriptions.mummy: A small-statured adult corpse preserved beneath layered linen wrappings, dried skin visible only around the eyes, mouth, and one clenched hand. Faded funerary cloth and a few tarnished amulets hang close to the body, while dark rot-like magic concentrates around the striking fist.
descriptions.mummy-lord: A small but commanding undead sovereign wrapped in countless layers of darkened linen, with a dry angular face, emberlike eyes, and a rigid ceremonial posture. A restrained collar, broken seal tablets, and bands of once-fine metal mark ancient rank, while one wrapped fist leaks necrotic dust and the other directs a sphere of consuming darkness.
descriptions.nalfeshnee: A huge, grotesquely powerful demon combining a boarlike tusked head, heavy ape-shaped torso, long clawed arms, bowed legs, and one pair of comparatively small ragged wings. Coarse dark fur gives way to warty gray flesh across the belly, while a pulsing halo of warped force and fear distorts the air.
descriptions.night-hag: A gaunt fiendish crone with long iron-gray hair, deeply lined indigo skin, hooked nails, and eyes like banked coals. Layered robes are hung with keys, bone charms, and small dream-catch vessels, while a carefully guarded black soul bag rides close against the ribs.
descriptions.nightmare: A large fiendish warhorse with a glossy coal-black coat, powerful equine anatomy, luminous ember eyes, and fire replacing much of its mane and tail. Each iron-dark hoof burns without being consumed and leaves a brief print of flame, while smoke rolls from the nostrils.
descriptions.noble: A compact adult aristocrat in a fitted travel coat over a discreet steel breastplate, with carefully arranged hair, fine gloves, and a narrow rapier. The clothing is costly but practical, marked by restrained embroidery and one small signet rather than extravagant regalia.
descriptions.ochre-jelly: A large mustard-ochre mass of translucent living slime that spreads in thick lobes and clings to vertical stone. Darker granules swirl slowly beneath its glossy skin, and a rope-like pseudopod extends from the leading edge without suggesting a head or face.
descriptions.octopus: A small natural octopus with a soft rounded mantle, horizontal amber eyes, and exactly eight flexible arms lined with paired pale suckers. Its skin shifts from rust red to stony gray in irregular patches as it flows over the seabed.
descriptions.ogre: A hulking giant with a heavy belly, sloped shoulders, long powerful arms, and a broad coarse-featured head. Thick hide garments and scavenged leather straps cover the torso, one fist grips a tree-trunk greatclub, and several rough javelins ride in a bundle across the back.
descriptions.ogre-zombie: A reanimated ogre corpse whose huge frame remains brutally strong despite gray slack skin, stiff joints, and a collapsed posture. Tattered hide wrappings cling to the belly and shoulders, one eye is clouded, and dark necrotic stitching holds major wounds closed without exposed organs.
descriptions.oni: A tall blue-skinned fiend with an ogre-like frame, two short ivory horns, black hair, sharp teeth, and clawed hands. Layered dark robes hang over practical lamellar armor, while the figure floats slightly above the ground and gathers a wavering indigo nightmare ray between its fingers.
descriptions.otyugh: A broad three-legged scavenger with a low knotted body, a vertical tooth-filled mouth, two long muscular tentacles ending in rough sensory pads, and a shorter eyestalk rising between them. Its hide is thick, folded, and mottled from life among refuse, with no recognizable humanoid anatomy.
descriptions.owl: A tiny woodland owl with a round facial disk, large dark eyes, short hooked beak, and soft mottled plumage specialized for silent flight. Broad wings curve around the body as feathered legs lower two compact taloned feet.
descriptions.owlbear: A massive quadrupedal predator combining the barrel-chested body and powerful limbs of a bear with a great owl-like head. A hooked beak, forward-facing amber eyes, and a facial disk of stiff feathers blend into a thick feathered mantle before giving way to coarse fur.
descriptions.panther: A sleek black panther with a long flexible torso, low shoulders, rounded ears, and powerful hindquarters. Rosette markings appear only where cool light crosses the glossy coat, while pale whiskers and yellow-green eyes sharpen the otherwise shadow-dark face.
descriptions.pegasus: A magnificent celestial horse with clean athletic proportions, bright intelligent eyes, and one pair of enormous feathered wings rooted behind the shoulders. A pale mane and tail stream like fine silk, while the white coat carries a faint warm sheen rather than an artificial glow.
descriptions.phase-spider: A large predatory spider with eight long segmented legs, a low armored cephalothorax, rounded abdomen, clustered black eyes, and paired fangs wet with venom. Half the body is slipping into the Ethereal Plane, turning translucent and doubled by a cool violet afterimage.
descriptions.piranha: A tiny deep-bodied river fish with a blunt forehead, bright watchful eye, silver-gold scales, and a powerful jaw lined with interlocking triangular teeth. Red washes the lower jaw and belly while translucent fins hold it steady in dark water.
descriptions.pirate: A small-statured adult deck fighter dressed in practical layers suited to salt, rain, and climbing rigging. A weathered coat hangs over a fitted vest and sash, a single dagger is held in reverse grip, and an animated, self-assured expression supports the pirate's distracting panache.
descriptions.pirate-captain: A compact adult ship commander in a fitted salt-stained coat over light armor, with sturdy sea boots, a practical sash, and a weathered hat kept low against the glare. A slender rapier is balanced in one hand and a single flintlock-style pistol in the other, both maintained with professional care.
descriptions.pit-fiend: A large but overwhelmingly powerful devil with a heavily muscled red-scaled body, crown of backward horns, one pair of broad leathery wings, clawed digitigrade legs, and a long barbed tail. One fist grips a brutal fiery mace while the jaws expose venomous fangs and a dense fear haze distorts the air around the head.
descriptions.planetar: A towering celestial warrior with a powerful jade-toned humanoid body, an ageless focused face, and one pair of enormous white feathered wings. Minimal celestial armor protects the torso and forearms without obscuring the physique, while a great two-handed sword burns with concentrated radiant light and a holy burst gathers behind the shoulders.
descriptions.plesiosaurus: A large marine reptile with a broad barrel-shaped torso, four powerful tapered flippers, a remarkably long flexible neck, and a small wedge-shaped head lined with narrow conical teeth. Smooth dark skin is mottled above and pale below, with no shell, fins, or serpentine body coils.
descriptions.polar-bear: A massive adult polar bear with a long neck, narrow head, small rounded ears, and broad paws spread for traction. Dense off-white fur clumps slightly with frost and seawater, revealing powerful shoulders beneath rather than a perfectly clean plush coat.
descriptions.pony: A compact sturdy pony with a thick neck, shaggy mane, short strong legs, and a broad intelligent face. Its chestnut coat carries a pale blaze and feathering around dark hooves, with a simple halter resting loosely on the head.
descriptions.priest: A small-statured adult cleric in practical ceremonial layers over light protective leather, with a plain travel cloak and a clearly fictional sunburst emblem. A sturdy mace is held near the body while warm radiant flame gathers above the open free hand.
descriptions.priest-acolyte: A compact adult temple acolyte in simple layered vestments over practical traveling clothes, carrying a plain mace and a small undecorated devotional focus. Warm radiant light gathers around the open free hand, illuminating an earnest face without tying the figure to any real-world faith.
descriptions.pseudodragon: A cat-sized miniature dragon with four slender clawed legs, two leathery wings, a narrow horned head, and a long flexible tail ending in a dark venomous stinger. Fine red-brown scales cover its agile body, and large amber eyes lend alert intelligence without becoming human.
descriptions.psychic-gray-ooze: A broad puddle of semitranslucent gray protoplasm that creeps by rolling its own edge forward. Dark mineral flecks and half-dissolved metal drift inside, while concentric violet pulses travel through the gel without forming eyes, a brain, or any other organ.
descriptions.pteranodon: A large flying reptile with a long backward-pointing cranial crest, toothless spear-shaped beak, narrow furred torso, and immense leathery wings stretched across elongated fourth fingers. Two compact clawed feet trail beneath a short tail, preserving a natural pterosaur build.
descriptions.purple-worm: A gargantuan burrowing worm with a mountain-thick segmented body, a circular jaw lined by several inward-curving plates of teeth, no limbs, and a long armored tail ending in a single venomous stinger. Overlapping violet plates are worn pale along the ridges, while acidic saliva steams in the cavern air.
descriptions.quasit: A tiny, wingless demon with a wiry crouched body, long grasping arms, narrow horned head, and clawed feet. Mottled swamp-green hide stretches over sharp joints, a thin tail counterbalances its movements, and its oversized eyes gleam with spiteful intelligence.
descriptions.rakshasa: A composed fiend with the upright body of a well-dressed humanoid, the head and striped fur of a tiger, and hands whose palms turn unnaturally backward. Tailored layered garments and restrained jewelry suggest immense patience and wealth, while the eyes remain cold and a thread of necrotic curse-light winds from one reversed hand.
descriptions.rat: A tiny brown rat with a low flexible body, blunt whiskered muzzle, rounded pink ears, bright black eyes, and a long naked tail marked by fine scales. Its quick paws grip the stone while coarse guard hairs shine along the back.
descriptions.raven: A glossy black raven with a heavy straight bill, shaggy throat feathers, intelligent dark eyes, and broad wings whose blue-violet sheen appears in the light. Its wedge-shaped tail spreads as strong black feet approach a perch.
descriptions.red-dragon-wyrmling: A young but powerfully built red dragon with four clawed legs, two leathery wings, a long counterbalancing tail, and a wedge-shaped head crowned by swept-back horns. Overlapping crimson scales darken along the spine, while ember light glows between a few throat scales.
descriptions.reef-shark: A sleek reef shark with a streamlined gray body, pale underside, pointed snout, five visible gill slits, and tall triangular dorsal fin. Broad pectoral fins steer between coral while rows of small sharp teeth show inside a natural crescent mouth.
descriptions.remorhaz: A gigantic arctic burrower with a long segmented body, dozens of sharp insectlike legs, a broad armored head, and crushing mandibles. White-blue dorsal plates are rimed with frost, but the flexible seams underneath glow furnace red, turning nearby snow to steam as the creature moves.
descriptions.rhinoceros: A large natural rhinoceros with thick folded gray hide, barrel chest, short powerful legs, and a broad head carrying one long nasal horn with a smaller horn behind it. Mud and grass cling to the lower flanks, and the small ears turn independently above watchful eyes.
descriptions.riding-horse: A fit riding horse with a balanced athletic frame, deep chest, clean long legs, and an attentive refined head. Its bay coat shines beneath a practical leather saddle and bridle, with a rolled blanket and small saddlebag kept close for travel.
descriptions.roc: A truly colossal raptor with the anatomy of a powerful eagle, including a deep feathered chest, hooked beak, one pair of immense wings, long feathered tail, and two taloned legs capable of carrying enormous prey. Individual weathered flight feathers are the size of trees, and scars mark a long life above mountain storms.
descriptions.roper: A stalagmite-shaped cave predator whose ridged stone-colored body conceals a vertical maw, a single glaring eye, and six long cordlike tendrils. Its hide mimics layered limestone and mineral drips so closely that only the wet teeth and slowly flexing strands reveal living tissue.
descriptions.rust-monster: A low pony-sized monstrosity with four clawed legs, a humped armored carapace, small deep-set eyes, and two very long feathery antennae sweeping from its blunt head. A segmented tail ends in a distinctive paddle-like fan, while rust-colored dust stains the mouthparts and forelimbs.
descriptions.saber-toothed-tiger: A large prehistoric cat with immensely developed shoulders, thick forelimbs, a short powerful back, and two long flattened upper canines extending below the lower jaw. Its tawny coat is mottled with faint broken stripes, and the mouth can open unusually wide without becoming reptilian.
descriptions.sahuagin-warrior: A lean sea-fiend with a sharklike humanoid head, lidless black eyes, gill slits along the neck, and a finned muscular body covered in dark green scales. Webbed clawed hands, digitigrade feet, and a strong dorsal fin suit both swimming and violent movement ashore.
descriptions.salamander: A large elemental warrior with a powerful humanoid torso rising from a long serpentine lower body, all clad in overlapping copper-red scales that glow between the seams. A crown of swept spines frames the angular face, and both hands wield a long spear whose head burns without consuming the metal.
descriptions.satyr: A lithe adult fey with a humanlike upper body, pointed ears, curling ram horns, and shaggy goat legs ending in cloven hooves. Chestnut curls and a short beard frame a sharp amused face, while a set of reed pipes hangs at the belt of loose woodland cloth.
descriptions.scorpion: A tiny desert scorpion with a segmented armored body, two grasping pincers, eight walking legs, and a jointed tail arched over its back to a single dark stinger. Fine sensory hairs catch the light along its sand-colored limbs.
descriptions.scout: A compact adult wilderness scout in fitted leather protection beneath a weather-stained hooded cloak. A longbow is held ready with a practical quiver high on the back, while a plain shortsword, rope coil, and small field pouch stay tight against the body for quiet travel.
descriptions.sea-hag: A gaunt amphibious fey with long seaweed-dark hair, mottled kelp-green skin, webbed clawed hands, and large pale eyes set in a deeply lined face. Ragged wrappings of net and waterlogged cloth cling to the narrow body, while small fin ridges and barnacle-like growths break the silhouette.
descriptions.seahorse: A tiny natural seahorse with a coronet-like bony crest, long tubular snout, upright armored body, small fluttering fins, and a tightly curled prehensile tail. Fine pale rings and speckles break across its ochre plates.
descriptions.shadow: An unnatural humanoid absence made from layered black vapor, with elongated arms, clawlike hands, and a hollow suggestion of a face where two dim voids interrupt the darkness. Its edges unravel into smoke and the lower body spreads flat against nearby surfaces instead of forming solid feet.
descriptions.shambling-mound: A massive ambulatory heap of waterlogged vines, roots, peat, and broad swamp leaves, with two long tendril arms and a low headlike rise suggested only by shadowed hollows. The plant mass is dense and asymmetrical, and occasional blue sparks travel through rain-wet stems without forming a solid humanoid body.
descriptions.shield-guardian: A towering humanoid construct built from interlocked steel, stone, and dark wood plates, with broad protective shoulders, long pistonlike arms, and a featureless helm. A single arcane sigil glows in the chest where a bound amulet would direct it, and repaired seams knit themselves with restrained golden magic.
descriptions.shrieker-fungus: A waist-high subterranean fungus with a thick pale stalk and a broad cupped cap split into vibrating gill-lined folds. Several smaller lobes cluster at its base, and the central opening flexes like a resonating chamber without forming an animal mouth.
descriptions.silver-dragon-wyrmling: A young silver dragon with four graceful legs, two long wings, a tapering tail, and an elegant wedge-shaped head framed by swept horns and a narrow neck frill. Bright silver scales shift toward cool blue in shadow, while frost gathers between the throat plates before a breath attack.
descriptions.skeleton: An animated humanoid skeleton held together by dim necromantic force, every major bone readable beneath remnants of decayed leather equipment. Empty eye sockets face forward as one bony hand grips a shortsword and a shortbow with small quiver rides across the back.
descriptions.solar: A towering celestial champion with a powerful luminous humanoid form, serene uncompromising face, and one pair of immense gold-white feathered wings. One hand holds a tall slaying bow drawn with a radiant arrow, while a great sword flies independently beside the body under precise divine control.
descriptions.specter: A malevolent remnant of a humanoid stretched into an incorporeal column of darkness. A hollow face and two elongated hands emerge from wind-torn bands of vapor, with a cold blue-white core barely visible inside the chest and no solid clothing, legs, or bones.
