descriptions.sphinx-of-lore: A great celestial with the tawny body and four paws of a lion, a dignified humanlike head, and one pair of broad eagle wings. Fine geometric inscriptions mark the feather shafts and a simple brow circlet, while luminous eyes and a restrained ring of psychic script gather around the open mouth.
descriptions.sphinx-of-valor: A massive celestial guardian with the deep-chested body and four paws of a lion, a stern humanlike warrior face framed by a heavy mane, and one pair of enormous eagle wings. Natural bronze-toned plates reinforce the shoulders without becoming worn humanoid armor, while thunder gathers in the chest for a battlefield-shaking roar.
descriptions.sphinx-of-wonder: A cat-sized celestial sphinx with the compact body and paws of a young lion, a thoughtful humanlike face framed by a small golden ruff, and one pair of feathered wings. Fine geometric markings shimmer across its cream fur, and bright eyes convey intense curiosity rather than childishness.
descriptions.spider: A tiny hunting spider with a compact two-part body, eight slender legs, clustered glossy eyes, and short articulated fangs. Fine hairs stripe its brown abdomen, while delicate silk catches between two rear legs.
descriptions.spirit-naga: A large malevolent serpent with a long heavy coil, dark iridescent scales, a refined almost humanoid face, and a crown of swept-back spines rather than hair. Venom shines on the fangs, and dim violet-black energy gathers between floating motes near the raised head for a necrotic ray.
descriptions.sprite: A hand-high fey warrior with delicate humanoid features, leaf-fine clothing, and a single pair of translucent insect wings veined like a dragonfly. A needle-thin sword rests in one hand and a tiny recurved bow in the other, both proportioned to the sprite rather than full-size tools.
descriptions.spy: A small-statured adult infiltrator in muted civilian layers tailored to conceal light armor and climbing tools. A narrow shortsword hangs close to the hip, a compact hand crossbow is held beneath the cloak, and an observant, forgettable face is partly shaded by a practical hood.
descriptions.steam-mephit: A small wiry elemental with an impish humanoid frame, broad membranous wings, clawed hands and feet, and a narrow face constantly blurred by curling vapor. Its pale wet hide appears half-condensed from steam, with beads of water gathering and evaporating along every edge.
descriptions.stirge: A repulsive bat-sized flying monstrosity with one pair of membranous wings, a compact furry body, four many-jointed gripping legs, and a long needlelike proboscis projecting from a small head. Its abdomen swells slightly behind the wings, and pincerlike feet curl inward for attachment.
descriptions.stone-giant: A tremendously tall, lean giant with smooth slate-gray skin, long sculptural limbs, deep-set eyes, and close-cropped dark hair. Simple fitted hides and woven belts leave the athletic frame clear, while a stone club shaped from a natural column and several carefully selected boulders show a practiced thrower.
descriptions.stone-golem: A towering humanoid construct assembled from enormous fitted blocks of dark stone, its blank head and broad torso carved with shallow geometric control channels. The arms end in crushing slab fists, and a concentrated knot of pale force light shines behind a single chest aperture without making the figure mechanical.
descriptions.storm-giant: A colossal giant with smooth violet-gray skin, flowing white hair, and a tall athletic frame that moves with the calm weight of deep water. Streamlined scale armor and storm-dark cloth suit both sea and sky, while an immense sword carries thunder along its edge and lightning coils around the free hand.
descriptions.succubus: A poised fiend in an alluring humanoid guise whose predatory nature shows through swept-back horns, dark featherless wings, fine claws, and watchful eyes. Elegant garments frame rather than conceal a lean, strong build, while a narrow tail and a faint psychic shimmer betray the supernatural disguise.
descriptions.swarm-of-bats: Dozens of ordinary small bats wheel together as one dense, coordinated cloud, each with a furred body, large ears, and two finger-boned membrane wings. The nearest animals remain anatomically crisp while the farther members form a broad turbulent mass without merging into one creature.
descriptions.swarm-of-crawling-claws: Dozens of severed humanoid hands animated as a coordinated undead swarm, each desiccated cleanly at the wrist and moving on hooked fingers. They vary in size, age, gloves, jewelry, and decay, but none has an attached arm; cold necrotic shadow binds the crowded mass without graphic blood.
descriptions.swarm-of-insects: Thousands of small beetles, biting flies, and crawling insects move as one dense ground-skimming cloud, with a few crisp six-legged individuals readable along the leading edge. The swarm thickens into a dark shifting core without combining into a single body or hiding the varied natural forms.
descriptions.swarm-of-piranhas: A dense, coordinated school of palm-length predatory fish with deep compressed bodies, blunt heads, red-orange bellies, and triangular silver scales. Their short jaws open to show interlocking teeth as the swarm turns around a dark central void rather than forming one giant creature.
descriptions.swarm-of-rats: Scores of ordinary brown and gray rats surge together in a tightly packed ground-level mass. Rounded ears, whiskered muzzles, nimble paws, and long naked tails remain individually readable at the front, while overlapping bodies create the swarm's restless wave-like shape.
descriptions.swarm-of-ravens: A churning flock of glossy black ravens, each with a heavy bill, broad feathered wings, and wedge-shaped tail. The birds overlap into a cohesive airborne mass, but the nearest individuals remain distinct as open beaks and beating wings create a visible cacophony.
descriptions.swarm-of-venomous-snakes: A dense moving knot of dozens of small venomous snakes in varied natural patterns, their slender bodies weaving over and beneath one another. Several triangular heads rise independently with forked tongues tasting the air, but the swarm remains a collection of distinct animals rather than one many-headed monster.
descriptions.tarrasque: A gargantuan terrestrial apex monstrosity with an immense horned reptilian skull, armor-plated torso, two huge clawed hind legs, two shorter but powerful forearms, and a long crushing tail. Its back rises into a crown of jagged reflective carapace plates that catch magic like mirrors, while the deep chest expands for a thunderous bellow.
descriptions.tiger: A large natural tiger with a long muscular torso, heavy forequarters, round ears, and a thick counterbalancing tail. Black stripes break across rich orange fur and pale underparts in individually varied bands, while whiskers and amber eyes remain sharply alert.
descriptions.tough: A compact adult street enforcer with a thick neck, scarred knuckles, and layered leather clothing reinforced at the shoulders. A heavy iron mace rests in one hand, while a plain heavy crossbow and short bolt case sit across the back beneath a weathered half-cloak.
descriptions.tough-boss: A compact, battle-tested humanoid gang leader in practical reinforced armor, with a battered round shield strapped behind one shoulder and numerous old repairs visible across the kit. A heavy warhammer rests in one hand while a well-maintained crossbow and bolt case show the discipline behind the rough exterior.
descriptions.treant: An ancient living tree of immense height whose thick trunk divides into two branchlike arms and two root-bound walking legs. Deep bark folds suggest a long solemn face beneath a crown of asymmetrical boughs, while moss, small ferns, and old lightning scars make the creature part of the forest rather than a carved statue.
descriptions.triceratops: A gigantic mature ceratopsian with a barrel-shaped body, sturdy columnar legs, a parrotlike beak, two long brow horns, one shorter nasal horn, and a broad shield-shaped neck frill. Pebbled hide and old horn wear keep the animal naturalistic, powerful, and grounded.
descriptions.troll: A towering, long-limbed giant with ropey muscle, a hunched spine, rough moss-toned skin, an elongated nose, and stringy dark hair. Its arms hang nearly to the knees and end in broad hooked claws; fresh seams of paler tissue mark places where severed flesh has unnaturally regrown.
descriptions.troll-limb: An independently animated severed troll forearm and clawed hand, green-gray and corded with unnatural muscle. The non-graphic cut end has already sealed beneath knotted pale regeneration tissue, while thick black nails bite into the ground and new sinew threads slowly weave across the stump.
descriptions.tyrannosaurus-rex: A gigantic terrestrial predator with a deep muscular skull, heavy serrated teeth, powerful neck, barrel-like torso, two-fingered forelimbs, long counterbalancing tail, and immense birdlike hind legs. Pebbled hide and restrained sparse filamenting along the spine keep the animal naturalistic and physically plausible.
descriptions.unicorn: A tall, powerfully graceful horse with a single long spiraled horn rising from the brow, luminous intelligent eyes, cloven-looking but equine hooves, and a flowing mane and tail touched by subtle celestial light. Its coat is natural and finely textured rather than metallic, with faint radiant markings around the face and chest.
descriptions.vampire: A small, ageless undead noble with wax-pale skin, controlled predatory features, sharp canine teeth, and dark eyes catching a restrained crimson glint. Precisely fitted old-fashioned garments permit climbing and combat, while one hand carries grave-cold force and the lower coat edge begins to unravel into escape mist.
descriptions.vampire-familiar: A small-statured living humanoid servant in discreet dark traveling clothes, with an athletic climber's build, sleep-starved pallor, and two faint healed punctures at the neck. Narrow dagger sheaths line a hidden bandolier, and a matched blade in each hand carries a thin umbral haze supplied by the distant vampire master.
descriptions.vampire-spawn: A small, unnaturally lean undead humanoid with wax-pale skin, dark-veined temples, sharp canine teeth, and hands ending in climbing claws. Once-fine clothing hangs travel-stained and torn, while the eyes hold a hungry red glint and the body remains taut with predatory speed rather than corpse-like decay.
descriptions.venomous-snake: A tiny alert viper with a triangular head, narrow neck, keeled olive scales, and dark zigzag markings along its flexible body. Two short folding fangs show inside the open mouth while the tail anchors a tight defensive coil.
descriptions.violet-fungus: A waist-high violet mushroom with a thick pallid stalk, a bruised purple cap, and four long rootlike tendrils emerging around its base. The flexible tendrils end in wet dark tips and lift independently, while mottled fungal flesh and ragged gills keep the organism unmistakably plantlike.
descriptions.vrock: A towering vulture-like demon with a hunched humanoid torso, bald hooked-beak head, long taloned legs, clawed arms, and one pair of vast ragged feathered wings. Oily plumage gives way to scaled gray flesh around the chest, while a cloud of dark spores drifts from between the shoulder feathers.
descriptions.vulture: A broad-winged scavenging vulture with dark layered plumage, a bare wrinkled head and neck, hooked pale beak, and heavy feet. Its long primary feathers spread like fingers while a rough feather ruff frames the naked skin.
descriptions.warhorse: A towering battle-trained horse with a deep chest, powerful hindquarters, long clean legs, and an alert high-carried head. Its dark coat shines beneath a reinforced military saddle and restrained leather-and-mail chamfron, leaving the muscular body readable and ready to charge.
descriptions.warhorse-skeleton: A complete animated horse skeleton with a long skull, deep rib cage, articulated spine, and four bony legs held together by faint necromantic force. Remnants of a cracked bridle and torn saddle straps cling to the bones, while cold light occupies the empty eye sockets.
descriptions.warrior-infantry: A compact adult foot soldier in a layered leather jack with a simple iron cap and a tall practical shield strapped close to the body. A plain infantry spear is gripped at mid-shaft, and every buckle, wrap, and boot shows disciplined maintenance rather than wealth.
descriptions.warrior-veteran: A small-statured adult soldier marked by years of campaigning, with a steady stance, repaired mail, reinforced half-plate, and a face weathered by old scars rather than theatrical rage. A serviceable greatsword is gripped in both hands, while a heavy crossbow and compact bolt case ride across the back.
descriptions.water-elemental: A towering mass of living water whose cresting torso, head, and two long arms emerge from a constantly folding wave. The transparent body carries bubbles, foam, and suspended sand through its currents, while the lower form pours into a broad moving pool instead of separating into legs.
descriptions.weasel: A tiny weasel with an exceptionally long flexible body, short legs, small rounded ears, bright eyes, and a narrow inquisitive muzzle. Sleek chestnut fur pales under the throat, and a slim tail follows the curve of its body.
descriptions.werebear: A small but massively muscled lycanthrope in hybrid bear form, with a broad ursine head, rounded ears, thick fur, powerful humanoid arms, and short climbing claws. A leather harness supports several balanced handaxes, while the lower body combines an upright stance with heavy bear-like feet.
descriptions.wereboar: A small, thickset lycanthrope in hybrid form, combining a humanoid torso and gripping hands with a bristled boar head, powerful neck, cloven lower legs, and upward-curving tusks. Rough travel clothes strain across the shoulders, and a bundle of balanced javelins rides across the back.
descriptions.wererat: A small lycanthrope in hybrid form, combining a wiry humanoid torso and grasping hands with a narrow ratlike head, rounded ears, coarse gray-brown fur, digitigrade feet, and a long naked tail. A compact hand crossbow hangs ready beside patched urban clothing adapted around the altered limbs.
descriptions.weretiger: A compact feline lycanthrope in hybrid form with a tiger-striped head, rounded ears, long whiskers, muscular digitigrade legs, and clawed humanoid hands. Light layered clothing leaves the limbs free, while a longbow, compact quiver, and long striped tail complete the agile hunter profile.
descriptions.werewolf: A small lycanthrope in hybrid form, with a lean humanoid torso, long wolf muzzle, high ears, coarse gray-brown fur, digitigrade legs, clawed hands, and a balancing tail. Torn but practical clothing remains around the waist and shoulders, and a longbow is slung where transformed hands can still reach it.
descriptions.white-dragon-wyrmling: A young white dragon with four strong legs, two ragged-edged wings, a long tail, and a blunt predatory head crowned by backward-sweeping horn plates. Matte ivory scales blend with snow, blue shadows deepen between the plates, and crystalline frost crusts the nostrils and throat.
descriptions.wight: A disciplined undead warrior with desiccated gray skin, pale burning eyes, and remnants of dark martial armor fitted over a lean corpse. One hand holds a straight sword veined by necrotic cold, while a black-limbed bow and quiver remain ready at the shoulder.
descriptions.will-o-wisp: A tiny airborne knot of undead light with a brilliant white-blue core surrounded by nested translucent veils and thin electrical filaments. The glow subtly compresses and trails as it moves, but contains no skull, face, body, lantern, or visible flame fuel.
descriptions.winter-wolf: An enormous supernatural wolf with a deep chest, long legs, broad snowshoe paws, and dense white fur shaded blue-gray along the back. Ice crystals rim its muzzle and guard hairs, and cold light gathers in the throat behind formidable canine teeth.
descriptions.wolf: A lean gray wolf with long legs, a deep narrow chest, erect ears, and a powerful muzzle framed by pale cheek fur. Its layered winter coat darkens along the back, and the full brush tail stays level as it moves with focused pack-hunter economy.
descriptions.worg: A horse-sized fey predator shaped like an immense, brutal wolf, with a broad heavy skull, coarse black-gray mane, long forelegs, and intelligent ember-brown eyes. Its powerful jaws hold uneven ivory teeth, while the thick brush tail and clawed paws preserve a recognizable canid build.
descriptions.wraith: A small incorporeal undead figure wrapped in long, shredded remnants of a hooded shroud, with only a narrow skull-like suggestion and two cold points of light visible inside the darkness. Its arms taper into vaporous hands, and the lower body streams away as black mist veined by dim necrotic energy.
descriptions.wyvern: A lean two-legged dragon with a narrow horned head, a deep chest, one pair of vast leathery wings that serve as its forelimbs, and a long flexible tail ending in a heavy venomous stinger. Coarse overlapping scales and oversized climbing talons suit a mountain ambush predator rather than a noble true dragon.
descriptions.xorn: A squat three-legged elemental with a stone-plated, barrel-shaped body, three evenly spaced muscular arms, three crystal-bright eyes set around the upper torso, and a wide toothed mouth opening at the crown. Mineral fragments protrude like natural armor, and each hand has powerful claws made for moving through rock.
descriptions.young-black-dragon: A young swamp dragon with a lean four-legged body, skull-like narrow face, long forward-curving horns, sunken dark eyes, one pair of ragged-edged wings, and a whip tail built for swimming. Glossy black scales carry greenish reflections, while acid beads smoke along the jaw and chest plates.
descriptions.young-blue-dragon: A young desert dragon with a compact four-legged frame, a long ridged head dominated by one heavy forward-pointing nasal horn, frilled ears, one pair of strong wings, and broad digging claws. Deep cobalt scales fade to sand-gray underneath, while branching electricity crawls from horn to teeth.
descriptions.young-brass-dragon: A young desert dragon with a compact four-legged frame, broad swept facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of sandy membrane wings, and a long tail adapted to rapid burrowing turns. Fine brass-colored scales shine warmly along the flanks and darken around the joints, while heat gathers behind the narrow teeth.
descriptions.young-bronze-dragon: A young coastal dragon with a strong four-legged body, beaklike ridged snout, paired swept-back horns, finlike cheek spines, one pair of broad wings, and a long swimming tail. Bronze scales carry sea-green patina around the face and wing joints, while blue-white lightning traces between the teeth.
descriptions.young-copper-dragon: A young hill dragon with a supple four-legged frame, long wedge-shaped head, swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of broad wings, and a flexible tail suited to climbing. Bright copper scales are already beginning to weather green around the face and joints, while clear acid glistens between the teeth.
descriptions.young-gold-dragon: A young noble dragon with a long serpentine four-legged body, elegant horned head, paired trailing barbels, one pair of broad sail-like wings, and a finned tail suited to swimming. Fine gold scales overlap like coins along the back and soften to warm cream below, while firelight glows through the throat plates.
descriptions.young-green-dragon: A young forest dragon with a long low four-legged frame, narrow hooked snout, a tall leaflike crest running from brow to neck, one pair of broad wings, and a supple swimming tail. Deep green scales break into barklike patterns along the flanks, while yellow-green poison mist seeps from the nostrils.
descriptions.young-red-dragon: A young volcanic dragon with a muscular four-legged body, wedge-shaped skull, long swept-back horns, ridged brow, one pair of dark leathery wings, and a heavy whip tail. Crimson scales deepen to near black along the spine, while ember light pulses between the armored throat plates.
descriptions.young-silver-dragon: A young mountain dragon with a sturdy four-legged body, broad shield-shaped head, paired swept-back horns, layered silver cheek spines, one pair of pale wings, and a long balanced tail. Bright scales reflect the sky like brushed metal, and cold mist pools around the muzzle with a faint stilling shimmer beneath it.
descriptions.young-white-dragon: A young arctic dragon with a compact muscular quadrupedal body, wedge-shaped head, backward-sweeping crown spines, hooked ice-climbing claws, one pair of broad pale wings, and a strong swimming tail. Dense white scales shade to blue-gray along the spine, with rime forming around the nostrils and teeth.
descriptions.zombie: A reanimated adult humanoid with pallid desiccated skin, clouded eyes, slack posture, and torn ordinary clothing stiff with grave dirt. The body is visibly dead but kept non-graphic: bruised discoloration, rigid fingers, and an unnatural neck angle convey decay without exposed organs.
